title: MCOptimized / Pojav Edition
description: a modpack for pojav users that optimizes their game like crazy!!!!!!!!
body:
this modpack is made for low-end computers with barely and mods i defenely reccomand and yeah if anyone wants to suggest an update i honesly dont know yet how to get suggestions from you guys but soon there will be an system anyways this modpack is for optimization with barely any mods!!!

### What does this modpack add? ###
this is an optimization modpack for mobile/for pojavlauncher and its an optimization pack most stuff is common optimization mods but eh i mean it does optimize fps :D
